notes: Perplexity re-test with h2_mode=1 (cascade shutdown + GOAWAY). Previous test #282 failed with h2_mode=2 + hold causing cascade failure (all streams killed). Now using same strategy as ChatGPT/Claude: h2_mode=1, h2_end_stream=1, h2_goaway=1, h2_hold_request=0. Template is perplexity_sse with SSE events including end_of_stream marker. 프롬프트 입력은 clipboard paste 사용.
